g.text: Query Timeout & SIMD Search Implementation Path

ul.li: Memory Alignment: results_ptr must be 32-byte aligned for AVX-512 _mm512_load_ps.
Atomic Latency: is_expired uses Relaxed ordering to prevent cache-coherency stalls across cores.
SIMD Locality: 1000 FP32 vectors ≈ 128KB, optimized for L2 data cache residency.
RAII: RwLockReadGuard is dropped during wrapper consumption or early Err return.
